summary: Reflect checkbox could stack repeated transforms and clearing removed unrelated transforms.
vary3Cpp and vary4Cpp parse native output with parallel stream into plain ArrayList.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs stress parse large vary output repeatedly; verify count/order.

summary: varyCSCpp/vary3Cpp/vary4Cpp read CString result but never call cleanup_string.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs repeated large vary runs with Native Memory Tracking or Process Explorer.

summary: calculateGradient frees only one CString; calculateGradient2 frees wrong object and leaks cstring2.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs repeated gradient calls while watching native memory.

summary: Windows Gradle native build needed UCRT64 toolchain/link changes.
HashTriple source/runtime color and memory behavior diverge or are uncertain; Abdul aliases external mutable maps and collapses bulk colors to one defaultColor.
Large OSNO/all-equation CInfoAll strings are allocated natively and never freed; confirmed in MAIN and Abdul.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs large OSNO formula/all-equation run repeated under NMT/Process Explorer.

summary: CInfoAll Java field order did not match the C++ struct; Java could read/free the wrong native char* fields on all-equation paths.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs runtime ABI slot test and all-equation comparison.

summary: cover/getEmpties/small_cover return pointers to static std::string buffers that retain largest capacity and are not thread-safe; MAIN runtime has same static symbols.
evidence: MAIN Ghidra function index static destructors
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs huge cover/not-filled memory run and concurrent cover smoke test.

summary: VaryLTask checkStatus takes Optional by value, so ExecutionException does not propagate to caller.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs forced Database.loadStorage failure inside VaryLTask and assert task fails visibly.

summary: CycleVaryTask overwrites prior exception state for each future, so an early failed future can be erased by a later successful future.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs first-future-failure/later-success test.

summary: Wrapper.loadPictureLR uses lr == "empty" identity comparison instead of equals, selecting wrong native path for non-interned empty sentinel.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs loadPictureLR with new String("empty") smoke test.

summary: Main.stop destroys native ConnectionPool before shutting down the main executor; background tasks can use freed native DB pool.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs close-app-during-long-native-task test; local per-window executors remain covered by BUG-027.

summary: ProgressMultiTask.cancelled is a plain boolean set on FX thread and read from task/control flow without volatile or AtomicBoolean.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Cancel flag is now volatile. Still needs repeated multi-step cancel smoke test.

summary: tmp, cover, small_cover, fills.txt, search.txt, and other state files are relative to current working directory, which differs under Gradle, IDE, jar, and shortcuts.
Utils.readFromFile/writeToFile create only the target file, not parent directories, and use platform default charset.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. File helpers now create parent directories and use UTF-8. Still needs nested-path/non-ASCII smoke test.

summary: Database.codeAndOEMatch inner loop indexes codeNumbers[i] and OEPatternArray[i].charAt(i) instead of j, giving wrong validation or exceptions.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs unit tests with multi-number code/OE strings, including mismatch at j > 0.

summary: Native cancel_flag is global and reset inside each vary call, so concurrent native vary runs can cancel or uncancel each other. Java now serializes native VaryCS/Vary3/Vary4 calls with one fair ReentrantLock.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs UI smoke test: start a long vary, attempt another vary, verify native calls queue rather than overlap and first/cancel behavior is unaffected.

summary: fireAway4 calls makeStarts(startBilliard, movesMax, cores, ...) even though signature is depth,maxDepth; typical large moves disables intended split and small moves can generate wrong code lengths.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs Vary4 output comparison for small and large move bounds.

summary: Utils.numThreads is half availableProcessors truncated to int, which can be zero on 1-core systems and is not memory-aware for 8-16GB users.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs -XX:ActiveProcessorCount=1 and -Dbilliards.threads tests.

summary: Native math/vary pipelines use hardware_concurrency directly or create one task/thread-local container per item; zero concurrency can hang/crash and large inputs can create thousands of threads/containers.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Native workers now use BILLIARDS_NATIVE_THREADS/default cap and bounded task chunks/inflight. Still needs BILLIARDS_NATIVE_THREADS=1/2/4 and large MRR/OSNO parity-memory tests.

summary: Utils.safeShutdownExecutor waits up to 20 minutes and is called from many JavaFX task event handlers, freezing the UI if workers do not terminate quickly.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. JavaFX callbacks now use Utils.shutdownExecutorAsync; background task finally blocks keep bounded blocking shutdown. Still needs cancel/finish UI responsiveness test.

summary: Utils.convert and billiards.vary.Convert call get(0) before empty-list validation; Wrapper swallows parse exceptions and silently drops malformed native output lines.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Empty converters now return Optional.empty; malformed native vary lines now throw. Still needs targeted parser tests.

summary: Cancel is intended to save progress, but prior draw/vary task cancellation either let too much queued work continue or discarded completed work after the user cancelled.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Graceful cancel now cancels queued futures, lets running work publish completed Storage, and returns through success handlers so partial progress is saved. Still needs manual long-cancel UI test.

summary: DrawPictureTaskUseLR uses static mutable breakPoint across all task instances; reads are outside the lock and state can leak between repeated or concurrent Use-LR runs.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. breakPoint is now per task instance and read/cleared under its lock. Still needs sequential empty-result Use-LR smoke test.

summary: CoverWindow, SmallCoverWindow, StablesWindow, and versioned CoverWindow classes used static file-backed strings loaded at class initialization, making state shared across windows and stale after cwd/path changes.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Saved cover/stables text is now instance-local and loaded at window construction. Still needs manual multi-window edit/save smoke test.

summary: Several locally-created ExecutorServices are not shut down in finally blocks, so exceptions before normal shutdown can leak worker threads and keep Java/native work alive.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Locally-created executors now shut down in finally with outstanding future cancellation on errors/cancel. Still needs fault-injection/thread-count baseline test.

summary: Native open_file_read does not throw on missing files and can return empty content; open_file_write does not create parent directories.
Native vary accumulates vector<vector<int32_t>>, serializes to one native string, Java copies into one String, then split duplicates into arrays and objects.
compute_max_inflight estimates 16KB per task but each task can capture a long vector and classify with additional allocations; busy-wait sleep throttling is coarse.
Viewer.redoFromScratch submits one Future per pixel and stores a 600x600 Object array of futures on every full redraw.
SaveV3Window checks IOException messages with reference comparison to empty string, so null/empty/non-interned messages are handled incorrectly.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs forced IOException null/empty/non-empty dialog text check.

summary: vary3 and vary_cs worker lambdas do not catch exceptions and decrement inflight only at the bottom; thrown exceptions can terminate the native process or leave the producer throttled forever.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon clean compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs forced worker failure test to verify no terminate/hang.

summary: Some exported native entry points can throw C++ exceptions across the C/JNA boundary, especially database_create, database_clear, create_connection_pool, and destroy_connection_pool.
tests: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs invalid DB path, zero pool size, and null destroy smoke tests.

summary: Gradle launch memory defaults are intentionally large for this program, but they were hardcoded with no temporary per-session override and native builds had no debug/portable CPU switch.
tests: Compile passed default and native-debug: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary; .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon backendSharedLibrary -PbilliardsNativeDebug=true. Defaults remain -Xms2g/-Xmx10g/direct 2g; temporary overrides use -PbilliardsXms/-PbilliardsXmx/-PbilliardsDirectMemory or env vars.

summary: JavaFX platform is hardcoded to mac-aarch64 for every macOS machine, so Intel Macs will resolve the wrong JavaFX native artifacts.
testBackend uses a Unix-style executable path and Windows test link args differ from backend TBB naming, so backend tests may fail even after the app builds.
copy_to_cpicture/copy_to_cinfo/copy_to_cinfoAll could leak already allocated char* fields if a later to_cstr allocation threw.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Allocation-failure injection still recommended.

summary: Large polygon refinement now uses TBB corner evaluation and a capped Boost.Asio batch reducer, with sequential fallback for small curve counts.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Needs OSNO runtime result parity/perf comparison.

summary: Cover runs now write tmp/holes.txt and the Viewer has a Load Holes button that loads those coordinates through existing OBO navigation.
evidence: Linux port Project_Improvement_Report.md Load Holes Feature
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Needs UI smoke test after a cover calculation.

summary: CoverWindow ran Wrapper.coverWrapper and coverWrapperAll synchronously on the JavaFX Application Thread, freezing the UI during long cover calculations.
verification: Compile passed: .\gradlew.bat --no-daemon compileJava backendSharedLibrary. Still needs manual cover run to verify window remains responsive and failure alert appears on bad input.

summary: At -O0 GCC emits unused static functions any_half_triples_positive and any_unstables_positive in verify.cpp; they reference declared but unimplemented HalfTripleInfo predicates and break the backend.dll link.
verification: Gradle native debug now uses -Og so the opt-in debug build links. Still needs source cleanup: either implement the HalfTripleInfo predicates or delete the unused legacy static helpers after confirming they are not needed.
